name: superpowers-lite
description: Opt-in Superpowers skills for Codex: explicit planning, inline execution by default, and no automatic worktrees or TDD.

interface.shortDescription: Opt-in planning and workflow skills for Codex
interface.longDescription: A personal fork of Superpowers tuned for explicit skill use: no implicit skill activation, inline plan execution by default, no automatic git worktrees, and TDD only when requested.
defaultPrompt: Use brainstorming to help me clarify this requirement.
Use writing-plans to turn this spec into an implementation plan.
Execute this plan inline without subagents or worktrees.
